nodes.name: Podargiformes
nodes.summary: Podargiformes（Podargiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Solomons frogmouth、茶色蟆口鴟、Marbled frogmouth等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: 蟆口鸱科

nodes.name: 茶色蟆口鴟
nodes.summary: 茶色蟆口鴟（Tawny frogmouth，学名 Podargus strigoides），分类上属于Podargiformes，并归入蟆口鸱科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.evidence: The tawny frogmouth (Podargus strigoides) is a species of frogmouth native to the Australian mainland and Tasmania and found throughout

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Tawny frogmouths are found throughout most of the Australian mainland except in far western Queensland, the central Northern Territory, and most of the Nullarbor Plain. In Tasmania, they are common throughout the northern and eastern parts of the state. They can be found in almost any habitat type, including forests and woodlands, scrub and heathland vegetation, and savannahs, but they are rarely seen in heavy rainforests and treeless deserts. They are seen in large numbers in areas populated with many river gums and casuarinas and can be found along river courses if these areas are timbered. Tawny frogmouths are a common nocturnal urban wildlife, especially in residential suburbs, having adapted to human presence
